title: Your Phone Can Now Run Your Entire Business. Here's How It Runs Mine.
summary: Liam Ottley demonstrates an "AI Operating System" framework with three layers (Context OS, Data OS, Intel OS) that enables running business operations from a smartphone using Claude Code Remote Control. The system integrates live data from Google Sheets, YouTube Analytics, Bitly, Calendly, Fireflies, and Fathom to give AI agents business context and strategic insights.
